race.description: Ladbrokes Big Bets Copy Now Maiden Plate
race.comment: BONUS SEASON (8) was an acceptor - and also drew well - at Kyneton on Friday, so if they run here it will be a good endorsement of her chances from connections. Beat home all bar Wednesday's ultra-impressive Sandown winner Roulette King at her most recent start, back in October, and has trialled well ahead of the return. Speaking of nice trials, there was a lot to like about the latest by FRAM STRAIT (4), who hugged the outside fence at Cranbourne but still won comfortably under a light ride. A son of Lonhro from a strong Godolphin family, he's poised to make an early impression. KRASNOLUDEK (5) will probably be at his best over even further than this but showed good improvement last start and can elevate again. MANGANO (12) was given a solid hitout at her latest jumpout, which hints at intent on debut.
